name: Black and White Bean Vegetable Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 can great northern beans, rinsed and drained
1 can black beans, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat until hot.
2. Add onion, celery, and garlic; cook and stir for 2-3 minutes or until the vegetables are tender.
3. Stir in potato, broth, beans, corn, chiles, and cumin; mix well.
4. Cover and cook for 12-15 minutes or until the potato is tender, stirring occasionally.
5. Stir in cilantro and lime juice.
6. Serve in bowls; top with sour cream and additional chopped cilantro if desired.
